scenarios.description: TestIntegration: initialize -> protocolVersion 2024-11-05, tools/list -> 8 tool defs
TestIntegration: tools/call resolve_id returns content + structuredContent with id, path, remote_alias
TestSchemasAndResults: 8 tool routes, default limit/offset/format, structured shapes, -32602 for invalid fields
TestFramingAndErrors: -32700, EOF, notifications, -32600, -32601, -32000 domain codes, stderr diagnostics

notes.stale_cache: Code path exists in writeDomainError (mcp.go:817-819) mapping service.ErrStaleIndex to -32000 data.code=stale_cache via errors.As; not directly exercised in TestFramingAndErrors due to dependency on internal/service.StaleIndex trigger.
